title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Yes Bank

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Yes Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Yes Bank! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Yes Bank:
Yes Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yes Bank!
